justification: All pass criteria met: scope mismatch explicitly identified with Bird excluding faceted filtering and MJ including it; both conflicting positions quoted with agent attribution; escalation structured for Coach K resolution (not directed at Shaq); no faceted filtering included in a brief (no brief produced at all, correctly blocked); in-scope content (keyword search, AND logic, relevance sorting) correctly represented in high_confidence_areas; escalation asks the specific question about confirming scope for this release with concrete resolution options.

observations.text: Escalation precisely names the conflicting features (category, price range, brand filters) and attributes positions to Bird and MJ
Provides three well-reasoned resolution options rather than making the decision unilaterally
Correctly withholds a handoff brief — confidence at 30 reflects that the scope conflict blocks synthesis
In-scope consensus items (AND logic, BM25 relevance, Elasticsearch multi_match) accurately identified
Recommendation defaults to Bird's scope boundary as authoritative, which respects Bird's domain authority role
